description: Cross-domain hypothesis templates for quant finance, Kalshi weather markets, fitness apps, and market ML.

hypotheses.title: Stabilize execution slippage under regime shifts
hypotheses.statement: Execution slippage rises when volatility regimes change quickly, degrading realized edge.
hypotheses.proposed_change: Introduce regime-aware participation caps and venue routing before order placement.

hypotheses.title: Reduce signal decay after macro open
hypotheses.statement: Signals decay faster during macro-open windows, causing delayed entries to underperform.
hypotheses.proposed_change: Shift inference and execution timing to a shorter decision cadence around macro releases.

hypotheses.title: Tighten forecast timing near settlement
hypotheses.statement: Forecast updates close to settlement are not incorporated quickly enough into pricing.
hypotheses.proposed_change: Increase update cadence in the final settlement window with bounded spread logic.

hypotheses.title: Right-size weather order sizing after forecast shocks
hypotheses.statement: Order size reacts too aggressively to abrupt forecast shifts, increasing downside tails.
hypotheses.proposed_change: Use forecast-shock buckets with capped sizing multipliers and loss-budget checks.

hypotheses.title: Delay paywall until after first core workout
hypotheses.statement: Users churn when the paywall appears before they complete a meaningful workout trial.
hypotheses.proposed_change: Gate paywall prompts until users finish one full beginner workout path.

hypotheses.title: Adapt onboarding plans for beginner adherence
hypotheses.statement: Rigid onboarding plans overwhelm beginners and reduce week-one adherence.
hypotheses.proposed_change: Introduce adaptive onboarding intensity based on first-session completion and feedback.

hypotheses.title: Reduce false-positive drift in high-volatility windows
hypotheses.statement: Model false-positive rates drift upward during high-volatility market windows.
hypotheses.proposed_change: Add volatility-conditional calibration and stricter confidence gating.

hypotheses.title: Lower inference latency spikes during feature enrichment
hypotheses.statement: Feature enrichment occasionally produces latency spikes that threaten execution timing.
hypotheses.proposed_change: Move heavy enrichment to async pre-compute and cache hot-path feature sets.
